name: finance ops managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 bank statements/week tool
description: For finance ops managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 bank statements/week, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow summaries instead of manual tracking and summarization of cash flow.
target_audience: finance ops managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 bank statements/week
problem_solved: Inconsistent cash flow visibility due to manual compilation of bank statements.
features: manual input option for bank statements
export to CSV for easy sharing
